text: Stepping through this sharply illuminated corridor, I am drawn to the vibrant play of purple and orange lights behind glass. Entering the R+D space, I’m enveloped by a sense of curiosity—a laboratory of ideas waiting to be explored. The text on the wall speaks of research and humanity’s connection with technology, matching my own desire to seek meaning within innovation. There’s an optimism here, softened by the thoughtful design, that suggests a belief in progress and collaborative creativity. I feel quietly inspired, my mind alert and eager to absorb the ideas echoing within these colorful walls.
